join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom='USD' AND value IS NOT NULL, ~34M rows)
join_order.notes: Use pre-built sub_adsh_index (mmap, 262144 slots). After probe, check sub_fy[sub_row] == 2023. No runtime build cost (P11).

Use pre-built pre_join_index (mmap, multi-value hash on adsh+tag+version). Iterate ALL payload entries per slot; check pre_stmt[pre_row] == is_code for each. Retrieve plabel_code from matching pre row. No runtime build cost (P11).

filters.method: pre_stmt[pre_row] == is_code, checked over payload entries

data_structures.sub_adsh_index: pre_built_mmap_hash (262144 slots, SubSlot{adsh_code:int32, sub_row:int32}, sentinel adsh_code==-1, hash_i32, bounded probe C24)
data_structures.pre_join_index: pre_built_mmap_hash_multivalue (PreSlot{adsh_code,tag_code,version_code,payload_offset,payload_count}, pool uint32_t[], sentinel adsh_code==-1, hash_i32x3, bounded probe C24)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local open_addressing hash_map keyed on Q6Key{int32_t name_code, int16_t stmt_code, int32_t tag_code, int32_t plabel_code}; value {int64_t sum_cents (C29), int64_t cnt}; AGG_CAP = next_pow2(300000 * 2) = 524288 per thread (P23); sentinel name_code == INT32_MIN (C20: use std::fill NOT memset)

aggregation_key_struct.note: ALL FOUR GROUP BY dimensions MUST be in key (C15, C30). Missing any one causes exact N× factor mismatch.

aggregation_values.sum_cents: int64_t — accumulate llround(value * 100.0) (C29 HARD CONSTRAINT; no double/float/Kahan accumulator)
aggregation_values.cnt: int64_t — increment by 1 per matching (num,sub,pre) tuple

parallelism.aggregation: thread_local — each thread owns its own AGG_CAP hash map (P17, P20 MANDATORY)
parallelism.merge_strategy: partitioned_merge — T×G = 64 × 300K ≈ 19M > 2M threshold; hash groups into P=64 partitions; each partition merged by one thread independently, zero contention
parallelism.merge_note: P25: AGG_CAP sized to 524288 (not 2M+) to keep per-thread footprint in L3; avoids sort-merge blowup

indexes.purpose: join_lookup — adsh FK→sub_row, then check sub_fy
join_lookup — (adsh,tag,version) FK→pre_rows[], then check pre_stmt and read pre_plabel

index_header_parse.note: C27/C32: ALL three variables (cap, mask, ht pointer) MUST be declared at run_query() function scope, NOT inside lambdas or inner blocks

output.string_quoting: C31 MANDATORY — double-quote ALL four string columns: name, stmt, tag, plabel (plabel may contain commas)
order_by: name_code ASC (stable tiebreaker C33 — prevents non-deterministic ordering at ties)

correctness_checklist: C2:  Load uom_dict, stmt_dict, name_dict, plabel_dict at runtime; find usd_code, is_code by string match
C9:  AGG_CAP = next_pow2(300000*2) per thread; sized for FULL group count not groups/nthreads
C15: Q6Key includes ALL FOUR: name_code, stmt_code, tag_code, plabel_code
C20: Use std::fill for sentinel (INT32_MIN) initialization, NOT memset
C24: Bounded probe loops: for(uint32_t p=0; p<cap; ++p) for BOTH indexes
C27: SubSlot and PreSlot structs defined; all 5 refactoring elements updated atomically
C29: sum_cents += llround(v*100.0); output sum_cents/100 . abs(sum_cents%100)
C30: stmt_code in key (even though constant is_code) to avoid N× factor mismatch
C31: printf("\"%s\"", ...) for name, stmt, tag, plabel in CSV output
C32: All index header vars (cap/mask/ht) declared at run_query() function scope
C33: Secondary sort key name_code ASC for stable LIMIT 200 ordering
P20: Thread-local aggregation maps; NEVER shared single map (catastrophic: 46800ms seen Q6 iter_1)
